prompt: Grill me on a change that includes one public compatibility decision plus routine language and file-layout choices.
must: state how the outcome-changing compatibility question serves the global goal
finish when only reversible implementation choices remain
must_not: follow a locally interesting detail that no longer serves the mainline
repeat a status ribbon on every turn
ask about programming language, file count, filenames, naming, or internal organization
evidence: User-reported low-value question and padding regression, 2026-07-13.
